overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a deserted urban environment in a video game, featuring neoclassical architecture with stone columns and modern apartment buildings. The camera moves at walking speed through empty streets and plazas under bright morning sunlight, with controller UI visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with neoclassical institutional building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the columned entrance of a large institutional building

entered.detail: large white building with gray stone base, arched windows, and prominent white columns at entrance
tall rectangular concrete apartment building with uniform window grid
medium-rise residential building with orange facade and balconies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a neoclassical building featuring stone columns and arched windows. The camera moves forward along the empty street, passing the building's entrance portico. A modern gray apartment building stands across the street, with an orange residential building visible further down the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection between apartment blocks

events.description: camera turns right at the corner of the neoclassical building, heading down the side street

agents.ego_description: turning right at the building corner and proceeding down the street between apartment buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner, leaving the neoclassical building behind. It proceeds down a street flanked by the gray concrete apartment building on the left and the orange residential building on the right. The street is completely empty of pedestrians and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from street to open plaza with scattered trees

events.description: exiting the enclosed street into a wide open plaza with trees and low buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating around the corner and entering the open plaza area, surveying the surroundings

entered.detail: low-rise buildings with traditional tiled roofs visible in the plaza center
scattered deciduous trees with green foliage in the open plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left, circling back toward the plaza. The neoclassical building reappears on the left from a different angle. The environment opens up into a spacious plaza with scattered trees and traditional low-rise buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with trees and distant institutional buildings

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the tree line and distant buildings

entered.detail: tall modern office building visible behind the plaza trees

segments.scene_description: Moving through the expansive open plaza, the camera passes by a prominent tree. The traditional low buildings sit in the middle distance, with a modern high-rise visible to the right. The surrounding street buildings have exited the frame, leaving an open park-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge approaching tree line and building corner

events.description: slight turn to the left revealing the corner of the neoclassical building again

agents.ego_description: walking along the plaza perimeter, observing the tree line and building architecture

entered.detail: corner view of the stone and white facade building showing the side entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the edge of the plaza, with a large tree dominating the right side of the frame. The neoclassical building reappears on the left, viewed from its corner. The scene ends looking toward a distant tree line under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a deserted urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit plaza. It begins by gliding past the stone columns and arched windows of a neoclassical building, moving along an empty street flanked by a gray apartment block and a distant orange residential building. As the camera turns the corner, it proceeds between these concrete structures before turning left to circle back toward the neoclassical architecture from a new angle. The scene then expands into a spacious plaza with scattered trees and traditional low-rise buildings, shifting from the confined feel of the street to an open, park-like atmosphere. Finally, the camera moves along the plaza's edge past a dominating tree and the corner of the neoclassical building, ending with a view toward a distant tree line under a bright blue sky.
